explanation: I selected the tax year for the income report.
The tax year is selected, so I am moving to the income source.
I chose Pension as the income source for this route.
The income source is selected, so I am moving to the change type.
I selected an increase so the new amount should be higher than before.
The change type is selected, so I am moving to the previous amount.
I entered the previous monthly amount.
The previous amount is complete, so I am moving to the new amount.
I entered the higher new monthly amount.
The amount is complete, so I am moving to contact details.
I chose Email as the initial contact method.
I entered the initial email address for contact.
The email contact details are complete, so I am moving to supporting notes.
I added a short note before reaching review.
The initial route is complete, so I am moving to check answers.
I followed the contact-method change link so I can update how follow-up contact should work.
I changed the contact method to Post, which switches the detail field to a postal address.
I entered the postal address for follow-up contact.
The updated contact details are complete, so I am moving back through supporting notes.
The notes were preserved, so I am returning to the review page to verify the updated contact method and address.

action.summary: I changed the contact method from Email to Post and confirmed the review page now shows the postal-address label and value.

explanation: The updated contact method and postal address are visible on the review page, so I am ending the task.
